# FastAnalytics S.A.S.

> FastAnalytics builds mathematical models and AI solutions for predictive decisions, specializing in spatiotemporal intelligence for citizen security, education, health, and transportation.

## Company Info
- Name: FastAnalytics S.A.S.
- Website: https://fastanalytics.co
- Email: hola@fastanalytics.co
- Location: Colombia
- Founded: 2024
- Tagline: IA espaciotemporal para decisiones predictivas (Spatiotemporal AI for predictive decisions)

## Founder
- Name: Andrés Pérez Coronado
- Role: Founder & AI/ML Architect
- Education: PhD in Mathematical Engineering (EAFIT University, 2025), Humphrey Fellow (University of Minnesota), Fulbright Scholar
- Experience: 20+ years in citizen security analytics, led teams of 80+ analysts
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andres-perez-coronado-63792618/
- Academia: https://independent.academia.edu/AndrésPérezCoronado

## Services
1. Spatiotemporal Modeling (ML/AI) — Predictive models crossing geography and time
2. AI Agents for Decision-Making — Real-time data analysis assistants
3. Data Collection (bots, surveys) — Massive surveys via bots, fast and frictionless
4. Security & Coexistence Consulting — 20+ years of field experience in public safety
5. Dashboards / Data Visualization — Actionable data dashboards
6. Data Training & Education — Hands-on data training for teams
7. Research & Publications — Applied research that becomes public policy
8. Chatbot Development — Bots for Telegram, WhatsApp, and more

## Products
- AlejoSeguro (https://t.me/AlejoSeguro_bot) — Telegram bot collecting georeferenced citizen security perceptions in Bogotá. Tag: Citizen perception
- AlejoGeo — AI + geospatial data · Spatiotemporal Intelligence platform. Collects georeferenced audio, text, video and images via chatbot. Cross-references with vector databases. Delivers PDF reports, dashboards and AI chat for decision-making. Sectors: health, mining & energy, construction, education
- GabyVigía — Predictive decision-making system: Watch · Predict · Decide. Detects weak predictive signals using Machine Learning and spatio-temporal pattern analysis. 5 intelligence layers: Telegram chat, heatmap dashboards, actor graphs, PDF and audio reports. Coordinated AI assistants. 9-phase Decision Enneagon methodology

## Courses
- Ceci Teaches (https://t.me/Ceci_Teaches_bot) — AI-powered educational chatbot on Telegram. Personalized learning experiences, answers instantly, adapts to your level, available 24/7
- IA para Analítica de Redes Criminales (https://fastanalytics.co/curso-redes-criminales) — Introductory course on AI applied to criminal network risk factor analysis. Focus: Latin America and the Caribbean. No prior statistics or programming knowledge required. 10 hours, live virtual (synchronous), using R + AI. Objective: apply AI concepts to analyze risk factors generated by criminal networks. Learning objectives: build a criminal network (graph), apply centrality measures, visualize networks — all supported by AI. 4 modules: databases, data cleaning, criminal network fundamentals, visualization for decision-making. Target audience: law enforcement, security & justice, banking, insurance, and any organization facing criminal or fraud threats. Instructor: Andrés Pérez Coronado (PhD, 20+ years experience). Status: Coming soon

## Proven Results
- December 2021: Colombia's safest December in 19 years. -17% homicides nationwide, 772 municipalities with zero homicides, -33% homicides in Bogotá, Cali recorded days with zero homicides (30-year record). Model: Cuadrantes Outliers — designed and deployed by Andrés Pérez Coronado
- Year 2024: Crime trend broken in Colombia. -17.8% robbery, -25.9% residential theft, -13% massacres, 7 of 11 crimes reduced in Bogotá, 28,243 fewer robbery reports. Multicrimen model — designed and deployed by Andrés Pérez Coronado

## Publications
- Research Profile: https://independent.academia.edu/AndrésPérezCoronado (7+ academic papers)
- Book: "Policía para el Desarrollo Humano" (Grupo Editorial Ibáñez, 2021)
- Book (Co-author of all chapters): "Analítica de datos para la seguridad ciudadana" (Editorial Logos, 2024)

- Education
- Health
- Transportation
- Banking & Insurance (fraud detection)
- Private Enterprise
